prompt: Create a gritty, candid flash-photography street scene at night outside a neon-lit nightclub on an urban sidewalk. Two young women sit closely together on the curb in the foreground with their faces deliberately anonymized by soft square blur blocks. The left woman has blonde wavy shoulder-length hair, wears a sparkly silver sequined strapless crop top, a short black skirt, and clear platform heels, sitting cross-legged and holding a clear plastic cup with a red drink. The right woman has dark curly hair, wears a hot-pink satin mini dress with fuzzy pink trim, pink fishnet tights, and heels, leaning into her friend while holding a smartphone and a cigarette. The scene includes a wet-looking curb and asphalt gutter with spilled liquid, cigarette butts, a crushed can, a plastic cup, and small street debris. In the background, show a city street with bright car headlights, a yellow streetlamp glow, graffiti-covered walls, a black nightclub entrance with bouncers and patrons, queue stanchions, an electric-blue OPEN sign, and a large magenta neon sign reading LUXE. Use strong mixed lighting: purple and pink neon from the club, warm sodium streetlight, harsh phone-camera flash on the subjects, deep night shadows, realistic lens noise, slight motion blur on a passerby at the far right, wide-angle smartphone composition, documentary party-after-hours mood, photorealistic, unpolished, high detail.
